septal
  • API reference
  • Solvers
  • View page source

Solvers

NLP solver implementations.

Two backends are provided:

CasadiSolver

Multi-start IPOPT via CasADi. Accepts pre-built CasADi-compatible objective and constraint callbacks (see septal.casadax.callbacks).

JaxSolver

Bound-constrained multi-start L-BFGS-B via JAXopt. No constraint support; intended for box-constrained feasibility sub-problems.

Both classes expose a common solve(initial_guesses) -> SolveResult interface.

class septal.casadax.solvers.BaseSolver(cfg)[source]

Bases: ABC

Common interface for septal solvers.

abstractmethod initial_guess()[source]
Return type:

Any

abstractmethod solve(initial_guesses)[source]
Return type:

SolveResult

class septal.casadax.solvers.CasadiSolver(cfg, objective_fn, bounds, constraints_fn=None, constraint_lhs=None, constraint_rhs=None)[source]

Bases: BaseSolver

Multi-start IPOPT solver wrapping CasADi.

Parameters:

  • cfg (Any) – Config object with at least n_starts and max_solution_time.

  • objective_fn (Callable) – CasADi-compatible callable (e.g. produced by casadify_reverse()).

  • bounds (List[Any]) – [lb, ub] arrays, each of shape (n_decision,).

  • constraints_fn (Callable | None) – Optional CasADi-compatible constraint callable.

  • constraint_lhs (Any | None) – Lower bound on g(x).

  • constraint_rhs (Any | None) – Upper bound on g(x).

initial_guess()[source]
Return type:

Any

solve(initial_guesses)[source]
Return type:

SolveResult

class septal.casadax.solvers.JaxSolver(cfg, objective_fn, bounds, objective_args=())[source]

Bases: BaseSolver

Multi-start bound-constrained L-BFGS-B solver via JAXopt.

Parameters:

  • cfg (Any) – Config with n_starts and jax_opt_options.error_tol.

  • objective_fn (Callable) – JAX callable f(x, *objective_args) -> scalar.

  • bounds (List[Any]) – [lb, ub] arrays.

  • objective_args (tuple) – Extra arguments forwarded to objective_fn (JAX tracers are ok).

get_status(stationary_error)[source]
Return type:

bool

initial_guess()[source]
Return type:

Any

solve(initial_guesses)[source]
Return type:

SolveResult
